entity.summary: Japanese centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated by GMO Coin, providing order-book spot trading, leveraged exchange trading, crypto FX, market data, WebTrader, deposits and withdrawals, and public and private APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party website exposes exchange spot and leveraged trading, crypto FX, WebTrader, market data, deposits and withdrawals, and API services. The site identifies GMO Coin, Inc. and registration as a Japanese crypto-asset exchange service provider under Kanto Local Finance Bureau registration No. 00006.

evidence.title: GMO Coin official platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform exposes exchange trading, crypto FX, market information, account opening, WebTrader, deposits and withdrawals, and identifies GMO Coin, Inc. together with Japanese registration and industry-association memberships.

evidence.title: GMO Coin exchange trading
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange page documents order-book spot and leveraged trading, market and limit orders, order-book visibility, maker/taker fee mechanics, Post-Only, WebTrader, 24/7 trading rules, and API-based automated trading.

evidence.title: GMO Coin crypto API
evidence.notes: Current first-party API page documents public and private API access for crypto trading, market-price retrieval, automation, and authenticated exchange operations.
